title: Digest — Mar 22, 2026, 03:34 PM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Devlog Digest

## New Features and Fixes

- **Inventory Improvements**: The inventory modal now groups carried items by name, utilizing `countByName()` to streamline the display. Instead of seeing multiple rows for the same item, you'll now see a consolidated count, such as "Stone block  5". This change enhances usability and matches the existing stockpile behavior.

- **Survival Enhancements**: Two major fixes have been implemented to prevent early-game deaths:
  - The game has removed placeholder embark items, specifically the `Plump helmet seed` and `Stone pickaxe`, which were not providing any actual gameplay value.
  - A functional well has been introduced, allowing it to serve as a reliable drink source for your dwarves, ensuring they can survive longer after embarking.

These changes aim to improve the overall gameplay experience and balance during the early stages of colony management.

## Merged PRs
- #509
- #497

## Sim Health Check

Baseline scenario: 3 dwarves, 500 ticks (10 days)

- **Dwarves alive:** 3 / 3
- **Tasks completed:** 176
- **Avg stress:** 67.4
- **Deaths:**
  - No deaths

prs.title: fix: group carried items by name in inventory modal
fix: replace placeholder embark items, add well/mushroom_garden structures
